title: [Q] Is this project dead?
author: J43fura
body:
I am seeing new PRs and Issues, however the latest commit has been in Jan 12, 2024.
Vulnerabilities are building up too, anyone forking this repo and making sure it is up to date?

comments.author: s-light
comments.body:
after some digging - i have the slight **feeling** that the core developer (https://github.com/Siemienik)
has now moved to https://github.com/handsontable/handsontable
and as this is a commercial project there is no time left for his really nice opensource projects...

hopefully  someone else has the motivation and energy to get this going again....

comments.author: awdorrin
comments.body: @Siemienik do you have plans to update this project?

comments.author: SanjayBabuSP
comments.body: I think it's time now for someone to step forward and fork this repo and maintain PR's and fixes.

comments.author: oliviertassinari
comments.body:
> I think it's time now for someone to step forward and fork this repo and maintain PR's and fixes.

The community is discussing this in #2764.
